description_long: This is a rectangular bank building set within a neatly trimmed green lawn bordered by a low hedge. The front facade features a prominent portico supported by four classical columns, above which sits a triangular pediment with the word 'Bank' in gold letters and a gold dollar sign on the roof. The entrance is accessed via a wide gray pathway flanked by small shrubs and trees, leading to a set of double doors. The building itself is primarily light gray, with a flat roof and a raised central section. The sides and rear of the building are plain, lacking windows or additional ornamentation. The overall design combines neoclassical elements with a modern, simplified form.
description: A neoclassical-style bank building with a columned portico, gold signage, and a manicured green lawn bordered by hedges.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain gray wall, the edge of the portico, and the green lawn bordered by hedges.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the columned portico, gold 'Bank' signage, main entrance, and landscaped pathway.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the plain wall and the side of the portico with adjacent greenery.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the simple, unadorned back of the building and the surrounding lawn.
attribute_signage: Gold 'Bank' text and a gold dollar sign symbol are mounted above the main entrance on the front facade.
attribute_entrance_design: Main entrance features a set of double doors beneath a portico with four columns and a triangular pediment, accessed by a wide pathway and flanked by small shrubs.
